memory:memory/2026-06-21.md:90:100.snippet: - LinkedIn pipeline tested and working: BLUF (image) + sections (text) both confirmed on LinkedIn ### Lessons Learned - When explaining technical steps to user, give CLEAR STEP-BY-STEP instructions: 1. Click + button → add X 2. Click + button → add Y 3. Delete old Z 4. Click arrow between A and B → set filter Don't assume user will figure out the order. List every step explicitly. - **NEVER send manual LinkedIn posts or any manual action without explicit user approval first.** Cron handles everything automatically. Manual test posts caused duplicate errors and locked up Make.com. - Test posts were sent before cron ran, causing the 08:00 cron to hit duplicate content errors → Make.
